context: Tests whether SwiftUI performance guidance reflects current lazy stack behavior and avoids stale claims that offscreen lazy rows always remain alive.

checklist.name: Lazy lifetime accuracy
checklist.description: States that offscreen lazy-stack views can be removed and later deleted with view-local state, rather than promising they remain alive indefinitely.

checklist.name: Durable state placement
checklist.description: Recommends moving draft or durable row state outside the row view when it must survive scrolling away.

checklist.name: Data-level filtering
checklist.description: Recommends filtering data before ForEach instead of returning zero or one top-level row from each element with an if branch.

checklist.name: Constant row shape
checklist.description: Requires stable identity and a constant number of top-level subviews per ForEach element, with wrapping if needed.

checklist.name: Scroll estimate caveat
checklist.description: Warns that lazy stacks estimate offscreen sizes, so absolute content-size or offset assumptions can shift during programmatic scrolling.

checklist.name: Geometry feedback
checklist.description: Flags geometry updates feeding shared state as a layout feedback risk and recommends stable sizing, layout primitives, custom Layout, or thresholded narrow geometry updates.

checklist.name: Prefetch nuance
checklist.description: Does not rely on onAppear as the first setup point; mentions body or layout may run before onAppear because of prefetching.
